issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 21 dmg (81% of 26 HP) on floor 12
issues.description: At turn seq 873 (floor 12, encounter 2, turn 17), the enemy dealt 21 damage when the player had 26 HP. This is 81% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 21 damage (81% of player's 26 HP)

issues.title: 5 consecutive encounters with >90% HP (floors 1-2)
issues.description: Encounters 0 through 4 (5 in a row) ended with the player above 90% HP (>72). This suggests these encounters provide no meaningful challenge. Encounters: f1e0(HP=80), f1e1(HP=80), f1e2(HP=80), f2e0(HP=80), f2e1(HP=73).

issues.title: Systemic combo cap bug: maxCombo=3 despite 90.9% accuracy (expert)
issues.description: The expert player achieved 90.9% overall accuracy across 36 encounters, yet maxCombo never exceeded 3. Every single run across ALL profiles shows maxCombo capped at exactly 3, indicating a hard cap bug in the combo system. The combo multiplier progression (1.0x->1.15x->1.3x->1.5x->2.0x) is unreachable beyond combo 3, removing a core damage scaling mechanic.
reproductionSteps: Answer 4+ questions correctly in a single turn
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter reset logic — likely resets at end of each turn or encounter instead of persisting across consecutive correct answers within a turn. Check if hand size (typically 3-5 cards) is capping combos.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: void_weaver on floor 6 took 24 turns (prev floor avg: 3.3)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 against void_weaver (boss) required 24 turns to resolve, which is 7.2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 247 damage and took 0.
issues.suggestedFix: Review void_weaver HP/damage scaling for floor 6; consider smoother difficulty curve for boss enemies

issues.title: expert defeated on floor 12 despite 90.9% accuracy — balance problem
issues.description: The expert player achieved 90.9% accuracy over 36 encounters and reached floor 12, but still lost. With near-90% accuracy and optimal play, the player should be able to complete a 12-floor run. The inability to win despite high skill suggests damage scaling outpaces available healing/shielding, or the combo cap bug (maxCombo=3) prevents necessary damage output.
issues.suggestedFix: Fix combo cap bug (likely primary cause), add campfire healing between floors, or reduce late-game enemy damage scaling
